name: Lead → CRM Auto-Routing Pipeline
description: Inbound leads from any source auto-tagged, scored, and routed to the right pipeline stage with owner assignment.

routing_rules.description: Define how leads get assigned to team members

client_variables.scoring_criteria: Describe what makes a hot vs cold lead for this client

setup_steps: Audit client's current CRM pipeline and custom fields
Define lead scoring criteria with client
Map lead sources to CRM tags/properties
Build n8n workflow: Webhook → AI score → CRM create/update → Route → Notify
Configure OpenAI prompt for lead scoring based on client criteria
Set up Slack notifications for high-priority leads
Connect all lead source webhooks (forms, ads, etc.)
Test with sample leads from each source
Train client team on pipeline stages and what to expect
n8n_workflow_nodes: Webhook Trigger (receives lead from any source)
OpenAI - Score lead (1-10) based on criteria
GHL/HubSpot - Assign owner based on routing rules
Slack - Send notification for hot leads
Google Sheets - Log all leads for reporting
